projects.title: NimbusOps Platform
projects.description: Multi-cloud orchestration dashboard for a logistics enterprise.

detail.subtitle: A multi-cloud orchestration dashboard that unified three cloud providers into a single control plane for a logistics enterprise.
challenge: Global Logistics Corp operated across AWS, Azure, and GCP with separate teams managing each environment. Deployments were inconsistent, monitoring was fragmented, and cost visibility was poor. Their engineering team spent 40% of their time on operational toil rather than building features.

They needed a unified platform that would give their teams a single pane of glass for infrastructure management while maintaining the flexibility of using best-of-breed services from each cloud provider.
solution: We designed and built NimbusOps — a centralized orchestration dashboard that abstracts away cloud provider differences while preserving full access to native APIs when needed.

The platform features a unified deployment pipeline with Terraform-based IaC templates, real-time cost tracking across all three providers, consolidated alerting, and a self-service portal for developer teams. We implemented role-based access control so each team sees only the resources relevant to their domain.
The dashboard was built as a React SPA backed by a Go microservices layer, with each cloud integration running as an independent adapter service for resilience and independent scaling.
detail.resultsIntro: Within three months of launch, the platform transformed how Global Logistics Corp manages its cloud infrastructure.
detail.techStackIntro: The project leveraged a modern cloud-native architecture with technologies chosen for scalability, maintainability, and developer experience.

projects.title: InsightAI Analytics
projects.description: Predictive analytics engine for a healthcare data science team.

detail.subtitle: A predictive analytics engine that helps clinicians anticipate patient deterioration hours earlier than traditional methods.
challenge: Helix Health's data science team was drowning in disconnected EHR data with no way to operationalize their models. Manual reporting cycles took days and predictions never reached the bedside.
They needed a production-grade ML platform that could ingest streaming clinical data, serve models in real time, and surface insights through clinician-friendly dashboards.
solution: We built an end-to-end MLOps pipeline with feature stores, model registry, and an A/B testing framework — paired with a React dashboard tailored for clinical workflows.
Models are retrained nightly on de-identified data, with drift detection and human-in-the-loop review before each promotion to production.
detail.resultsIntro: Six months after rollout, the platform measurably improved care quality.
detail.techStackIntro: Built on a modern Python ML stack with a React frontend.

projects.title: CartFlow Commerce
projects.description: High-performance e-commerce platform handling 10K+ daily orders.

detail.subtitle: A headless commerce platform built to handle holiday-scale traffic without breaking a sweat.
challenge: Their legacy monolith couldn't keep up with seasonal spikes, causing checkout failures and lost revenue.
solution: We rebuilt the storefront on a headless architecture with edge-cached product pages and an event-driven order pipeline.
detail.resultsIntro: Holiday season ran without a single incident.

projects.title: PulseTrack Health
projects.description: Cross-platform wellness app with real-time wearable sync.

detail.subtitle: A cross-platform wellness companion that syncs with major wearables and gamifies daily health habits.
challenge: PulseTrack needed a single codebase that could deliver native-quality experiences on iOS and Android while syncing data from a dozen different wearable devices.
solution: We delivered a React Native app with a Bluetooth abstraction layer, offline-first storage, and a delightful animation system that keeps users engaged.
detail.resultsIntro: App Store featured in week one of launch.
detail.techStackIntro: React Native with native modules where it matters.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
